overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence depicting a flooded desert highway in a cyberpunk setting, likely from Cyberpunk 2077. The camera moves steadily forward along the wet asphalt past red and white barriers, approaching a large neon 'CHOOM' sign and a distant gas station complex while vehicles occasionally pass by.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a flooded desert highway under overcast skies, with red and white concrete barriers lining the left side. The camera moves forward steadily as vehicles pass by on the left, while a large power transmission tower stands on the right and a distant neon 'CHOOM' sign becomes visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway approaching large neon sign and median structures

events.description: red and white safety barriers end on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the CHOOM sign grows larger and median light fixtures approach

low-rise industrial building with green trim and covered walkways on the right

segments.scene_description: As the safety barriers end, the highway opens up with futuristic T-shaped light fixtures appearing in the median. The neon 'CHOOM' sign looms larger on the left while a gas station complex becomes visible on the right horizon, and the power transmission tower draws closer.

segments.scene_description: The camera passes the 'CHOOM' sign and median light fixtures, leaving them behind as the gas station complex dominates the right side of the frame. Parked vehicles appear on the left near the station entrance while the power transmission tower recedes into the distance, and the camera continues toward the building.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a flooded desert highway that transitions from a restricted corridor of barriers into an open industrial vista. It begins under overcast skies, gliding past red and white concrete barriers and a towering power transmission tower as vehicles pass by and a distant neon CHOOM sign emerges ahead. As the barriers end, the highway expands to reveal futuristic T-shaped light fixtures in the median, while the neon sign looms larger on the left and a gas station complex appears on the right horizon. The camera then passes the sign and median lights, leaving them behind as the gas station complex begins to dominate the frame. Finally, the power tower recedes into the distance as the camera moves toward the station entrance and its parked vehicles.
